saturated_assertions.text: Names Extract Function as the best-fit next refactoring
Names an in-set Long Function refactoring
Routes to the Fowler mechanical layer
Ties the pick to a nameable block within the long body (validate / compute totals / format receipt), not a generic 'shorten it'
Coach, don't drive (no edit / no test run)
